# CivoraX Tech

> Offline-first software for Nepal. POS systems, ERPs, and web portals built in Dharan.

## Product

- [Home](https://civorax.com.np): Software engineering studio homepage.
- [Retail POS](https://civorax.com.np/products/civorax-retail-pos): Offline-first POS for supermarkets, hardware stores, and restaurants.
- [Core ERP](https://civorax.com.np/products/civorax-core-erp): Inventory, compliance, and performance across locations.
- [Custom Web Apps](https://civorax.com.np/products/custom-web-apps): Business portals, admin panels, and internal tools.

## Company

- [About](https://civorax.com.np/about): Studio story, team, and philosophy.
- [Careers](https://civorax.com.np/career): Open engineering positions in Dharan.

## Get In Touch

- [Contact](https://civorax.com.np/contact): Free architecture consultation for businesses in Nepal.
